flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lake-Sumter State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lake-Sumter State College rose 36% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1k → 4.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lake-Sumter State College rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 (38.2% → 48.4%).
